author: ryanjamurphy
description: Enable alt+↑ and alt+↓ keyboard navigation.

manifest.author: ryanjamurphy
manifest.description: This plugin adds alt+up arrow and alt+down arrow keyboard navigation to Obsidian.
manifest.name: macOS Keyboard Navigation

name: macOS Keyboard Navigation

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Fixed a conflict with the default hotkeys for move line up/down.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Refactoring to clear up a minor error on launch (when Obsidian is first launched, there is no active leaf, but the plugin wanted one. No longer!).

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Enables <kbd>alt</kbd>+<kbd>↑</kbd>, <kbd>alt</kbd>+<kbd>↓</kbd>, and <kbd>alt</kbd>+<kbd>shift</kbd>+<kbd>↑</kbd> and <kbd>alt</kbd>+<kbd>shift</kbd>+<kbd>down</kbd> keyboard shortcuts in Obsidian.
